name: Apple Cinnamon Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 large Apples (Golden Delicious or Granny Smith), peeled, cored, and cut into 8 wedges
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
In a small bowl, mix the cinnamon and sugar together. Unroll the crescent roll dough; separate into 8 triangles. Cut each triangle in half lengthwise to make 16 triangular strips. Place an apple wedge on the wide end of each strip; roll up.
Arrange rolls in a 9x13-inch baking dish. Drizzle with the melted butter; sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar mixture. Pour orange juice or water into the baking dish, but not over the rolls.
Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until rolls are golden brown and apple wedges are tender.
